meaning: n.出口,太平门,退场,去世vi.退出,脱离,去世 [计]  离开当前命令行外壳
examples: There was a stampede for the exit.
The crowd made a mad rush for the exit.
He made a quick exit to avoid meeting her.
Likewise, Credit Suisse First Boston has talked about an exit from its merchant bank.
Whatever, rumors continue that despite his denials, Hastert is planning an '07 exit from the House.
